all.en: This document presents the proposed marketing budget plan for the upcoming fiscal year.
all.zh: 本文件呈現下一會計年度的行銷預算規劃提案。

all.en: Total proposed spending increases by eight percent over the current year baseline.
all.zh: 總提案支出較本年度基準成長百分之八。

all.en: The increase aligns with revenue growth targets approved by senior leadership.
all.zh: 增幅與高階主管核定的營收成長目標保持一致。

all.en: Digital marketing receives the largest share at forty percent of total spend.
all.zh: 數位行銷分配比重最大，占整體支出百分之四十。

all.en: This allocation reflects continued strong returns from paid search and social media.
all.zh: 此分配反映付費搜尋與社群媒體持續帶來的強勁回報。

all.en: Content marketing and search optimization together receive twenty percent of budget.
all.zh: 內容行銷與搜尋優化合計分配百分之二十的預算。

all.en: Investment in original research reports will expand to support thought leadership.
all.zh: 原創研究報告的投資將擴大，以強化思想領導地位。

all.en: Field marketing and event sponsorships represent fifteen percent of overall spending.
all.zh: 現場行銷與活動贊助占整體支出百分之十五。

all.en: We will focus on fewer but larger flagship events with strategic customer engagement.
all.zh: 我們將聚焦於較少但規模更大的旗艦活動，強化策略客戶互動。

all.en: Brand campaigns and creative production make up ten percent of the annual plan.
all.zh: 品牌活動與創意製作占年度計畫的百分之十。

all.en: A refreshed brand visual system will roll out in the second quarter as planned.
all.zh: 更新版的品牌視覺系統將依計畫於第二季推出。

all.en: Partner marketing and channel programs represent eight percent of the proposed plan.
all.zh: 夥伴行銷與通路計畫占提案計畫的百分之八。

all.en: Customer marketing and advocacy account for the remaining seven percent allocation.
all.zh: 客戶行銷與口碑推廣占剩餘的百分之七配置。

all.en: Technology platform fees are budgeted separately under marketing operations.
all.zh: 科技平台費用另列於行銷營運下單獨編列。

all.en: Headcount investments include four new specialist roles across growth and analytics.
all.zh: 人力投資包含成長與分析領域新增四個專才職位。

all.en: External agency partnerships will be consolidated to reduce overlap and complexity.
all.zh: 外部代理商合作將整併，以降低重疊與複雜度。

all.en: Key performance indicators include pipeline contribution, brand lift, and engagement.
all.zh: 關鍵績效指標包含對銷售管道貢獻、品牌提升與互動表現。

all.en: Quarterly business reviews will track performance against forecast and budget.
all.zh: 季度業務檢討將追蹤實際表現對照預測與預算。

all.en: Contingency funds equal to five percent of total budget are reserved for opportunities.
all.zh: 另保留總預算百分之五作為機會掌握的應變經費。

all.en: Risks include economic uncertainty and potential cost increases in media inventory.
all.zh: 風險包含經濟不確定性與媒體版位成本可能上揚。

all.en: We propose scenario planning to flex spending up or down by ten percent if needed.
all.zh: 建議導入情境規劃，可視需要將支出上下調整百分之十。

all.en: Approval is requested at the next finance and strategy committee meeting.
all.zh: 謹於下次財務與策略委員會會議提請核准。

all.en: Detailed appendices include channel level forecasts and assumption documentation.
all.zh: 詳細附錄包含各通路預測與假設依據文件。
